titleStmt.title: SII 17.729: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 729. (A.R. No. 672 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

This inscription records the order of Madhurāntaka Pottappichchōḷa to the effect that taxes like poṉvari, etc., should be levied only on 10 vēli of land and that the levies kuṟṟappaṭṭi and śīkāriyappēṟu, were remitted, for services in the temple of Tirumullaivāyal-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār.
Gaṇḍagōpāla figuring as the signatory of the grant is obviously the same as Madhurāntaka-Pottappichchōḷa. (cf., No. 719 above.)

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maturāṉtakap pottappic coḻaṉ Olai Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyiluṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattār
kaṇṭu viṭai tirumullaivāyil nālāvatu mutal tarattil varum poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa varikaḷ koḷḷumiṭattu pattu veli nilattukku
kkoḷḷavum kuṟṟappaṭṭiyum cikāriyappeṟu tiruppaṇikku Uṭalāka viṭṭom Ippaṭi ceyvate Ivai kaṇṭakopālaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.729 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
